ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "date_modeled" TEXT /* Date the poll data was modeled */,
  "date_start" TEXT /* Start date of the polling period */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the polling period */,
  "poll_subject" INTEGER /* Subject of the poll */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* Name of the pollster or organization conducting the poll */,
  "poll_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the poll (e.g., A+, B-) */,
  "poll_type" INTEGER /* Type of poll conducted */,
  "poll_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the poll result */,
  "poll_influence" REAL /* Influence score derived from the poll */,
  "poll_multi_version" INTEGER /* Indicates if the poll has multiple versions */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population group targeted by the poll */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party associated with the poll */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of respondents */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for data entry */,
  "poll_url" TEXT /* URL to the poll report or dataset */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the poll was conducted */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the poll was conducted */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the polling area */,
  "polling_method" TEXT /* Detailed method used for polling */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the poll results */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the poll */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster FOREIGN KEY ("pollster") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_type FOREIGN KEY ("poll_type") REFERENCES poll_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_subject FOREIGN KEY ("poll_subject") REFERENCES poll_subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject being polled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the subject (e.g., economic, healthcare, education) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subject is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the pollster's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was founded */,
  "is_reputable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the pollster is reputable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the poll type (e.g., telephone, online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polling method */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the poll type is online */,
  "is_phone" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the poll type is telephone */,
  "is_in_person" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the poll type is in-person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerns" (
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concern entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll it corresponds to */,
  "pct_concern_very" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are very concerned */,
  "pct_concern_some" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are somewhat concerned */,
  "pct_concern_not_very" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are not very concerned */,
  "pct_concern_none" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are not concerned at all */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents for the concern metrics */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date the concern data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerns_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusted_concerns" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll it corresponds to */,
  "pct_concern_very_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage for very concerned */,
  "pct_concern_some_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage for somewhat concerned */,
  "pct_concern_not_very_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage for not very concerned */,
  "pct_concern_none_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage for not concerned at all */,
  "adjustment_method" TEXT /* Method used for adjusting the concern metrics */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjusted_concerns_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the party is currently active */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
